title: Stack overflow in XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit)
body:
## Details

```
* thread #1, name = 'yosys', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x7ffff80feff8)
    frame #0: 0x0000000000a643dd yosys`Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::count(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&) const + 29
yosys`Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::count:
->  0xa643dd <+29>: callq  0x5d6998                  ; Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::do_hash(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&) const
    0xa643e2 <+34>: movq   0x8(%rsp), %rsi
    0xa643e7 <+39>: movq   (%rsp), %rdi
    0xa643eb <+43>: leaq   0x14(%rsp), %rdx

Backtrace:
* thread #1, name = 'yosys', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x7ffff80feff8)
  * frame #0: 0x0000000000a643dd yosys`Yosys::hashlib::dict<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::hashlib::hash_ops<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::count(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&) const + 29
    frame #1: 0x0000000000a66eb2 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 110
    frame #2: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #3: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #4: 0x0000000000a66f72 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 302
    frame #5: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #6: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #7: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #8: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #9: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #10: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #11: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #12: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #13: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #14: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #15: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #16: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #17: 0x0000000000a66f5d yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 281
    frame #18: 0x0000000000a66ed0 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 140
    frame #19: 0x0000000000a66f72 yosys`(anonymous namespace)::XAigerWriter::bit2aig(Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) + 302
... repeating
```

## Steps to reproduce the issue
Unpack the tarball and run `sh crash.sh`

[crash.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4827512/crash.tar.gz)

Crashes with https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/0835a86e30fc2a934f5e6c96b28c90b59654ed92, doesn't crash with yosys-2020.02.07 from [nixpkgs](https://nixos.org/nixos/packages.html?attr=yosys&channel=nixos-20.03&query=yosys) (https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/2e8d6ec0b06b4e51e222c15c8049130bc264ae57).

Tested on Linux (NixOS 20.03) and macOS (10.14.6).
